commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion. When God brings back the captivity of his people, Jacob shall rejoice, and Israel shall be glad. God hath scattered the bones That is, God hath brought to nothing the strength of all those that seek to please men, to the prejudice of their duty to their Maker. (Challoner) That. Hebrew, "who besiege thee. Thou hast confounded them, because "Septuagint seem to have correctly, as no one has been addressed before.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
